name: Pheasant Wild Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare wild rice according to package directions.
2. Saute onion in butter until tender.
3. Remove from heat; stir in flour until smooth.
4. Drain mushrooms and reserve liquid.
5. Add enough broth to the reserved mushroom liquid to measure 1 1/2 cups.
6. Gradually stir the broth into the flour mixture, add milk, and cook stirring constantly until thick.
7. Add rice, mushrooms, pheasant, pimento, parsley, salt, and pepper.
8. Place in a 2-quart casserole.
9. Sprinkle with almonds (if using).
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes.
